feed.title: Michael Shen's Personal Blog
feed.subtitle: Cheer for the Biangbiang Noodles and Eiffel Tower!
feed.rights: All rights reserved 2020, Michael Shen's Personal Blog

entry.title: Designing Workflows for Unfinished Questions
entry.content:
A methodological note on AI-assisted research workflows: unfinished questions should be preserved only when they can change the next action and meet resistance.

Read the note

entry.title: Learning Systems: States, Worlds, and Effective Variational Principles
entry.content: A mathematical note on why theories of learning should specify the world, quotient state space, training dynamics, and invariant observables before invoking variational principles.

entry.title: Git Tutor
entry.content:
Practice Git commands in a terminal simulator and watch the commit graph update live.

Open Git Tutor

entry.title: Demo
entry.content:
Interactive demonstration of an autonomous computational research workflow.

View Workflow Demo

entry.title: (Physics Note) Oscillator and Wave
entry.content: A short physics note explaining how the wave equation emerges from coupled oscillators and how normal modes diagonalize collective motion.

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content: It is my new Blog, where I'd like to share a little experiences about my research and some interesting things about my course.
